chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 442 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 06.10.2025 Mr. Dhanraj, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Ameenuddin Khaskheli, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Karim G. Luhrani, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Additional PG files CRO of the applicant, which shows that 29 cases, including the present one, have been registered against him. Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Counsel for the complainant as well as learned Additional PG does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of three months hereof. J U D G E Abdul Basit
